audit_items.proof_trace: The LiveAuction revert at L327-329 is unconditional and fires before any mutation to s_auctionStarts for that asset (assignment only occurs at L353, after all guards). The endedAuctions loop (L359-369) that deletes s_auctionStarts runs entirely after the eligibleAssets loop, so no within-call ordering can bypass the check. Proof holds under all inputs including duplicate assets and reentrancy via _onAuctionStart.
